vol_name: Tactile localization promotes infant self-recognition in the mirror-mark test
Manual action, fitting, and spatial planning: Relating objects by young children
vol_description: video files of fitting tasks with 16- to 33-month-old children.

Home visit video data sessions collected as part of Tulane's contributions to the NIH-funded Play and Learning Across a Year (PLAY) Project. Session data consist of the following:
-Video files of 1-hour natural play, 5-minute structured play, house walk-through, and questionnaires
-Responses to questionnaires covering the participant’s demographics, language, temperament, and locomotion
-Ambient noise decibel meter recordings captured during the 1-hour natural play

vol_name: What is the role of infant banging in the development of tool use?
vol_description: infant (7-14 months) banging with a wooden cube. video files
